name: Legislative & Policy
description: Policy drafting, legislative procedures, impact assessment, comitology, and inter-service consultation.

skills.description: Personalise this plugin to your DG, dossier, and working language
Briefing notes, negotiating briefs, ISC contributions, options papers
Draft EU regulations, directives, and decisions to Joint Practical Guide standards
ISC legal quality review, subsidiarity and proportionality analysis
Delegated and implementing acts, committee procedures, EP objections
Better Regulation impact assessments — problem definition, CBA, SME test
Economic analysis, market failure assessment, European Semester data
Draft ISC contributions — Agreement, Reservations, or Opposition with textual amendments
Draft EP Parliamentary Question responses (Rules 138 and 139) with clearance tracking
Run Art. 5(3)–(4) TEU subsidiarity and proportionality test with Protocol No. 2 risk
Maintain four-column document, track positions, draft pre-round mandate briefs
Full SWD impact assessment — problem definition, options, CBA, SME test, DNSH, comparison matrix
Draft complete EU regulation or directive — legal basis, recitals, operative articles, EM
Legal basis, subsidiarity, proportionality, and Charter rights review — mirrors CLS check
REFIT regulatory fitness check — five criteria, overall score, simplification opportunities
Simulate or draft a 12-week public consultation — stakeholder positions, synthesis, Commission response
Art. 290 TFEU delegated acts — enabling clause check, DA vs IA classification, scrutiny period, draft act
Charter of Fundamental Rights full assessment — Art. 51 scope, Art. 52(1) limitation test, all 54 articles
CBA/CEA quantification — compliance costs, SME test, OIOO, benefit monetisation, RSB-ready tables
